The health benefits of bamboo include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of bamboo include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The most common herbal preparations made with bamboo include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
